title: PolicyEvaluatedEventPayload
description: Payload for StructuredAuthz.PolicyEvaluated audit events. Emitted on every authorization decision the runtime records — deny by default, permit when AUDIT_EMIT_PERMITS=true. Counterpart of crates/runtime/src/audit.rs in the Rust runtime.

matchedPolicies.description: Policy ids that contributed to the decision (Cedar diagnostics.reason).

reasons.description: Human-readable reasons surfaced by the engine. Audit-only — never user-facing.
